sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ لُؤَيٌّ مِنْ زَمِيلِهِ أَنْ يُسَاعِدَهُ فِي مَهْمَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Luejj je zamolio kolegu da mu pomogne u zadatku.
sentences.translationEn: Luay asked his colleague to help him with a task.

sentences.translation: Kolega je rado pristao i sjeli su zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: The colleague agreed happily and they sat together.

sentences.arabic: أَنْهَيَا الْمَهْمَّةَ فِي وَقْتٍ أَقَلَّ مِمَّا تَوَقَّعَا.
sentences.translation: Završili su zadatak za manje vremena nego što su očekivali.
sentences.translationEn: They finished the task in less time than they expected.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لُؤَيٌّ «شُكْرًا» وَقَدَّمَ لَهُ فِنْجَانَ قَهْوَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Luejj je rekao «hvala» i donio mu šolju kafe.
sentences.translationEn: Luay said «thank you» and brought him a cup of coffee.
